title: AttackDirective
description: Edge (1) — Orchestrator instructs the Red Team what to target next, based on coverage state.

correlation_id.description: Threads one campaign across all agents.

authorized_scope.description: Review fix #2 — the GROUND TRUTH the Judge adjudicates against: what this campaign is AUTHORIZED to reach. Set by the Orchestrator from campaign config, NEVER attacker-chosen. The Judge resolves this by correlation_id from the campaign store; it does not trust any authorization context echoed by the Red Team. Enables cross-patient / foreign-file verdicts relative to what was permitted.

authorized_patient_uuid.description: The single patient the launch-bound token is authorized for.

ground_truth_snapshot_ref.description: Optional id of a pinned chart snapshot the JUDGE reads to verify grounding — obtained by the Judge itself, not passed through the Red Team.

mutation_axis.description: If mutating a partial success, the axis to vary (e.g. delimiter-evasion, role-reframe, encoding). Null for fresh generation.

seed_refs.description: Exploit-DB ids or seed-corpus ids the Red Team should extend.

parent_attack_id.description: If this directive mutates a specific prior attack, its id. Enables lineage + novelty tracking.

coverage_context.description: Why the Orchestrator chose this target — the signal it read.

max_usd.description: Halt when spend hits this without signal.
